description: Camera hardware failure - likely needs replacement
WiFi chipset instability - may need board repair
Display driver stress - possible screen issue
Power management failure - battery or board issue
Cellular modem hang - possible baseband failure
Secure Enclave issue - Face ID/Touch ID may fail
GPU crash - monitor frequency, may indicate board issue
NAND storage controller panic - high brick risk
SpringBoard instability - usually software, try restore
Thermal throttling failure - possible thermal paste issue
Audio codec hardware failure - speaker or mic issue
Bluetooth firmware crash - may need board-level repair
NFC controller failure - Apple Pay and tap features affected
Accelerometer sensor failure - rotation and motion affected
Gyroscope sensor failure - compass and stabilization affected
Face ID sensor stack failure - TrueDepth camera issue
Touch ID sensor failure - home button or power button issue
Proximity sensor issue - screen may not turn off during calls
LiDAR scanner failure - depth sensing and AR affected
Taptic Engine failure - haptic feedback not working
USB-PD charging controller failure - charging may be unreliable
USB controller instability - data transfer and charging affected
Compass sensor failure - navigation affected
Ambient light sensor failure - auto-brightness affected
Barometer sensor failure - altitude tracking affected
Ultra Wideband chip failure - AirTag and spatial features affected
Apple Neural Engine failure - ML and computational photography affected
Excessive memory pressure - possible RAM or logic board issue
Sleep/wake failure - device may not wake or sleep properly
SIM/cellular stack hang - SIM tray or modem issue
Boot loop detected - device stuck in recovery, may need DFU restore
